title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown discusses whether inventing general relativity could serve as a benchmark for testing AI. The segment explores the relationship between AI capability levels and fundamental scientific discovery, framing theoretical physics breakthroughs as an ultimate measure of machine intelligence.
